jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Monitoring page/light-theme CSS regression passed: 3 tests
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws restarted successfully; /api/status healthy; /monitoring redirected to login and /api/monitoring/stats returned 401 instead of 500; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: P4 light-theme compatibility for monitoring/health/status surfaces
lastRun.summary: Extended the global light-mode compatibility layer so monitoring/health/status-style warning, error, success, info, and neutral action surfaces keep readable backgrounds, borders, and status text in light theme.
validation: recent service logs checked with no new error/warn matches
lastRun.deployment: Production services restarted successfully and smoke test passed.
lastRun.nextTarget: Start P5 backlog: wire dashboard analytics API into dashboard charts/trends or mark it internal if intentionally unused.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
